channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: The almighty TV On The Radio masterpiece 'Return To Cookie M…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The almighty TV On The Radio masterpiece 'Return To Cookie Mountain' turns 20 today; take a look back with us
item.content:encoded: The almighty TV On The Radio masterpiece 'Return To Cookie Mountain' turns 20 today; take a look back with us

item.title: Hear Finnish screamo band Letterbombs' new track "God Is Fro…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Hear Finnish screamo band Letterbombs' new track "God Is From Texas"
item.content:encoded: Hear Finnish screamo band Letterbombs' new track "God Is From Texas"

item.title: People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territories in the Pacific Ocean — are dealing with the aftermath of intense winds and severe flooding from Super Typhoon Bavi.
item.content:encoded: People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territories in the Pacific Ocean — are dealing with the aftermath of intense winds and severe flooding from Super Typhoon Bavi.

item.title: Morrissey says "diversity is a lie" because the BBC won't pl…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Morrissey says "diversity is a lie" because the BBC won't play his new single
item.content:encoded: Morrissey says "diversity is a lie" because the BBC won't play his new single

item.title: MJ Lenderman, Karly Hartzman, Brad Cook join Tracey Nelson a…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: MJ Lenderman, Karly Hartzman, Brad Cook join Tracey Nelson at Durham popup show
item.content:encoded: MJ Lenderman, Karly Hartzman, Brad Cook join Tracey Nelson at Durham popup show

item.title: The Belgian soccer federation is challenging FIFA's ruling t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Belgian soccer federation is challenging FIFA's ruling to let Balogun play despite getting a red card in his previous game. Belgium's statement came just 11 hours before kickoff in Seattle. European soccer body UEFA criticizes FIFA's "incomprehensible and unjustifiable decision." n.pr/4vyVgU1
item.content:encoded: The Belgian soccer federation is challenging FIFA's ruling to let Balogun play despite getting a red card in his previous game. Belgium's statement came just 11 hours before kickoff in Seattle. European soccer body UEFA criticizes FIFA's "incomprehensible and unjustifiable decision." n.pr/4vyVgU1

item.title: Silverworks Island has announced that it will host London's …
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)

item.content:encoded: Silverworks Island has announced that it will host London's "biggest" screening of England's upcoming World Cup 2026 quarter-final match

item.title: Alien Sound confirmed that the stage was empty at the time o…

item.content:encoded: Alien Sound confirmed that the stage was empty at the time of its collapse and that there were no injuries

item.title: How do you find victory in defeat? On paper, Cape Verde’s …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
How do you find victory in defeat?

On paper, Cape Verde’s 3-2 loss to Argentina on Friday, “To see the commitment and the resiliency with the players and the pride, made us proud,” said Paulo De Barros, president of the Cape Verdean Association of Boston.

via @wgbh.org
item.content:encoded:
How do you find victory in defeat?

On paper, Cape Verde’s 3-2 loss to Argentina on Friday, “To see the commitment and the resiliency with the players and the pride, made us proud,” said Paulo De Barros, president of the Cape Verdean Association of Boston.

via @wgbh.org

item.title: Russia launched waves of missiles and drones targeting Kyiv …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Russia launched waves of missiles and drones targeting Kyiv early Monday that killed at least 11 people, authorities said. n.pr/4gsRA2d
item.content:encoded: Russia launched waves of missiles and drones targeting Kyiv early Monday that killed at least 11 people, authorities said. n.pr/4gsRA2d

item.title: Russia launched waves of missiles and drones at Kyiv early M…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Russia launched waves of missiles and drones at Kyiv early Monday, killing at least 12 people in an attack that exposed widening gaps in Ukraine's air defenses, authorities said. n.pr/4gYxJrD
item.content:encoded: Russia launched waves of missiles and drones at Kyiv early Monday, killing at least 12 people in an attack that exposed widening gaps in Ukraine's air defenses, authorities said. n.pr/4gYxJrD

item.title: The U.S. striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start agains…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start against Belgium in a Round of 16 match after a surprise decision by FIFA to allow him to play despite receiving a red card last week. n.pr/4p23tOB
item.content:encoded: The U.S. striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start against Belgium in a Round of 16 match after a surprise decision by FIFA to allow him to play despite receiving a red card last week. n.pr/4p23tOB

item.title: We asked our audience to share their favorite go-to recipes …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: We asked our audience to share their favorite go-to recipes for leftovers. Here are seven dishes — like stuffed peppers and a biryani casserole — that can help you use up all your fridge scraps. n.pr/4p88JjU
item.content:encoded: We asked our audience to share their favorite go-to recipes for leftovers. Here are seven dishes — like stuffed peppers and a biryani casserole — that can help you use up all your fridge scraps. n.pr/4p88JjU

item.title: Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special pl…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special place in immigration law. That's no longer the case, according to the administration and immigration lawyers. n.pr/4vMZV5r
item.content:encoded: Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special place in immigration law. That's no longer the case, according to the administration and immigration lawyers. n.pr/4vMZV5r

item.title: Thousands of people lost coverage over as little as $8 in de…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Thousands of people lost coverage over as little as $8 in delinquent payments. They didn't know their zero-dollar premiums had gone up and they owed money. Most now can't get coverage until 2027. n.pr/4b83NWk
item.content:encoded: Thousands of people lost coverage over as little as $8 in delinquent payments. They didn't know their zero-dollar premiums had gone up and they owed money. Most now can't get coverage until 2027. n.pr/4b83NWk

item.description:
